name: STORM
description: Researches a topic and writes a cited, Wikipedia-length report by simulating multi-perspective question asking. Co-STORM adds human collaboration. Research system by Stanford OVAL.

skills.name: Topic Research
skills.description: Researches a topic from the internet and organizes findings into a structured outline with sources.

skills.name: Cited Report Writing
skills.description: Writes a long, Wikipedia-style article with inline citations grounded in retrieved sources.

skills.name: Multi-Perspective Q&A
skills.description: Simulates experts asking questions from multiple perspectives to broaden research coverage.
